suite.name: Teste Usuario

test.name: Cenário: Buscar Usuário Existente com Sucesso

kw.name: Dado que estou conectado na API
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=minhaSessao, url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/1 path_url=/users/1 headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

C:\Users\Usuario\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python314\Lib\site-packages\urllib3\connectionpool.py:1097: InsecureRequestWarning: Unverified HTTPS request is being made to host 'jsonplaceholder.typicode.com'. Adding certificate verification is strongly advised. See: https://urllib3.readthedocs.io/en/latest/advanced-usage.html#tls-warnings warnings.warn(
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Então o status code deve ser ${STATUS_200}
kw.source_name: Então o status code deve ser ${status_esperado}

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: E mostro a resposta da API
Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

suite.doc: Suíte de testes para a API JSONPlaceholder
